seoDescription: Aesthetics Office — injectables, lasers, and body contouring from a nurse-and-physician team (Nancie Fox, RN and Dr. Adrian de la Torre, MD) at the Larkfield Center in Santa Rosa.
heroHeading: Aesthetic care from a nurse and physician team
heroSubheading: Nurse Nancie Fox, RN and board-certified physician Dr. Adrian de la Torre offer injectables, lasers, and body contouring at the Larkfield office in Santa Rosa.
aboutBody: Aesthetics Office is led by Nurse Nancie Fox, RN, BSN, who earned her BS in Nursing with a minor in Psychology and Women's Studies and has worked in the aesthetics industry since the early 1990s.

Dr. Adrian de la Torre, the practice’s board-certified Chief Medical Officer, earned his MD from the University of Minnesota and brings more than 20 years of experience with injectables and dermal fillers. Nancie and Dr. de la Torre have practiced together since 2014.
The practice operates from the Larkfield Center in Santa Rosa, offering complimentary consultations so every treatment plan is tailored to the individual.

services.title: Injectables
services.description: Botox, Dysport, and dermal fillers including Juvederm, Restylane, Sculptra, Radiesse, and Kybella.

services.title: Laser Treatments
services.description: Laser hair and tattoo removal, skin tightening, vein treatment, photo rejuvenation, and fractional resurfacing.

services.title: Body Contouring & Skin Tightening
services.description: Nonsurgical body sculpting and skin tightening using devices such as Emsculpt and Vanquish.

services.title: Anti-Aging & Hair Regrowth
services.description: IV therapy, red-light therapy, and hair-regrowth options including Nutrafol.

services.title: Skincare & Chemical Peels
services.description: Chemical peels and medical-grade skincare lines including Obagi, EltaMD, and Latisse.

testimonials.quote: Everyone I met at Aesthetics Office was so friendly and professional. I felt at ease from the moment I entered.
testimonials.author: Beth

testimonials.quote: She explained the laser neck and face treatment with such in-depth knowledge and experience. I felt at ease and informed.
testimonials.author: Tammy

testimonials.quote: I love Nancie and her team! They always make me feel welcome, answer all my questions, and put me at ease.
testimonials.author: April

notes: Nancie Fox RN + Dr. Adrian de la Torre MD; together since 2014, corp filed 2015 → founding year left blank. Rating 5.0/19 Google (re-verify count). Address 648 Larkfield Center; phone 707-577-8888. No first-party photos confirmed — no stock.
